compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Any 600W HPS ballast, Any 600W MH ballast
compatible_devices.notes: Mechanical analog timer relay controller; switches up to 4x600W HPS/MH lamp ballasts via standard Schuko outlets; mechanical clock with 15-minute intervals, max 48 switching moments per 24h cycle; three modes: clock, on, off; no sensors, no digital features, no app or WiFi; designed for HID lamps only
